metadata.title: Quick Side Peek Snags a Sharp Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this swift side peek catch two enemies off guard with clean aim and timing. Perfect example of how positioning changes the game.
Where do you like to hold for quick kills?
Drop your favorite plays in the comments!

Share your slickest quick peek plays below!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
